popularStory.headline: Bouchard V de Montmorency
popularStory.description: Bouchard V de Montmorency (1129-† 1189 Jérusalem), baron de Montmorency, seigneur d'Écouen, de Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, d'Attichy et d'Hérouville. Fils de Mathieu Ier de Montmorency et d'Aline, fille …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency於1129年出生在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特莫倫希時，他的父親Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency40歲，母親'Alice' FitzRoy22歲。他於1173年1月與Laurette de Hainaut在比利時結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1189年在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年60歲，埋葬在瑞士瓦特利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency于1129年出生在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特莫倫希时，他的父亲Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency40岁，母亲'Alice' FitzRoy22岁。他于1173年1月与Laurette de Hainaut在比利时结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1189年在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年60岁，埋葬在瑞士瓦特利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bouchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Michel, Normand, Pierre, Cecile, Gilles, Lucien, Alphonse, Jacques, Alain.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Burchard, composed of the elements burg ‘protection’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

French: in some cases, possibly also a nickname for someone with a big mouth (in either a literal or figurative sense), from bouche ‘mouth’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Buschor , Bushard , Bushaw , and Bushor .

variants.name: Bushard
meanings: Possibly, in some cases, also an Americanized form of German Buschard (see Bushart 2).

variants.name: Buschor
meanings: Swiss German: probably a Germanized form of French   Bouchard  . Compare   Buschur   and   Bushor  .

variants.name: Bushore
meanings: Americanized form of French Bouchard , reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. Compare Bushor .

en.lifeSummary: When Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency was born in 1129, in Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, France, his father, Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency, was 40 and his mother, 'Alice' FitzRoy, was 22. He married Laurette de Hainaut in January 1173, in Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1189, in Jerusalem, Palestine, at the age of 60, and was buried in L'Abbaye, Vaud, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency est né en 1129, à Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, France, son père, Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency, avait 40 ans et sa mère, 'Alice' FitzRoy, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Laurette de Hainaut en janvier 1173, à Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1189, à Jerusalem, Palestine, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency 1129 in Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency 40 und seine Mutter 'Alice' FitzRoy 22. Er hat im Januar 1173 in Belgien Laurette de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1189 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Jerusalem, Palästina und wurde in L'Abbaye, Waadt, Schweiz begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency è nato il nel 1129 nel Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, il suo padre, Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, 'Alice' FitzRoy, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Laurette de Hainaut nel gennaio 1173, nel Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1189, nel Jerusalem, Palestina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a L'Abbaye, Vaud, Svizzera.

ja.lifeSummary: Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorencyが1129年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorencyは40歳，母'Alice' FitzRoyは22歳であった。1173年1月にベルギーでLaurette de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年にパレスチナジャーウサレムで60歳で死去し，スイスヴァウドル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency(이)가 1129년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 'Alice' FitzRoy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1173년 1월 벨기에에서 Laurette de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스위스 바드 '압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency nasceu em 1129, em Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, França, seu pai, Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, 'Alice' FitzRoy, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Laurette de Hainaut em janeiro de 1173, em Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1189, em Jerusalem, Palestina, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency родился в 1129 г. в местности монтморенси, сине-ет-оис, Франция, его отцу по имени Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали 'Alice' FitzRoy, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Laurette de Hainaut январь 1173 г. в местности Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1189 г. в местности джирсеилем, Палестина в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности л'аббеи, вауд, Швейцария.

sm.from 1160 to 1189: mai le 1160 e o'o I le 1189

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency nació en 1129, en Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, su papá, Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency, tenía 40 años y su mamá, 'Alice' FitzRoy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Laurette de Hainaut en enero de 1173, en Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1189, en Jerusalem, Palestina, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suiza.
